response.reasoning: Bogdan Szabo has 17+ years of professional software engineering experience across web, mobile, desktop, and infrastructure domains, meeting the 15-year minimum. He holds staff-level positions and demonstrates technical leadership through mentorship, public speaking, and course creation. His recent role at re:cinq includes AI-agent infrastructure and MCP framework work, showing engagement with AI tooling. However, critical gaps emerge: (1) no formal AI/ML credentials (Master's/PhD preferred); (2) the AI work listed is engineering-infrastructure focused, not strategic or research-driven; (3) no demonstrated track record advising enterprise customers on AI adoption or building recognized AI platforms; (4) most work is building-layer execution, not strategic vision-setting at the director level required for this role. The candidate fits 'excellent staff engineer' but not 'principal engineer in AI strategy.'
strengths: 17+ years of professional software engineering across multiple domains and geographies, exceeding the 15-year requirement
Demonstrated technical leadership through staff-level roles, mentorship programs (Refactoring Dojos), public speaking (FOSS4G), and workshop creation
Modern infrastructure and cloud competency: AWS CDK, Kubernetes, Docker, and emerging AI-adjacent work (MCP, agentic workflows)
concerns: No formal AI/ML credentials (Master's or PhD) and no evidence of deep ML expertise or research background, which are preferred for this strategic AI role
Recent AI engagement is infrastructure/tooling-focused, not strategic platform-building or demonstrated 'recognized expertise in AI with products/platforms built with AI'

Limited evidence of strategic advisory capability: no mention of guiding enterprise AI/cloud adoption, influencing product direction at scale, or advising strategic customers—core responsibilities of this role

key_factors.factor: Total software engineering experience and seniority level
Cloud infrastructure and modern tooling competency

response.justification: Bogdan is a strong senior software engineer with deep technical breadth and proven leadership ability, but this Principal Engineer role specifically demands 'recognized expertise in AI' with demonstrated AI products/platforms and the ability to advise strategic customers on cutting-edge AI adoption. His AI work is recent (2 months), infrastructure-focused rather than strategic, and unsupported by formal AI credentials or a track record of AI-platform building. He would excel in a Director-level IC role focused on general software or infrastructure, but lacks the specialized AI strategy expertise and advisory track record this position requires.
